titleStmt.title: SII 7.192: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 192. (A.R. No. 27-C of 1901). ON A SLAB LYING UNDER THE IMAGE OF MATSYENDRANATHA AT THE JOGI-MATHA ON THE HILL AT THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ŇõrńęgaŠĻáńĀdhipatayńď namaŠł• . namastuŠĻĀgaŇõiraŇõcuŠĻĀbicaŠĻĀdracńĀmaracńĀravńď .
trailŇćkyanagarńĀraŠĻĀbhamŇęlastaŠĻĀbhńĀya ŇõaŠĻĀbhavńď . ŇõrńęjayńĀbhyudaya ŇõakavaruŠĻ£a
1345 neya varttamńĀna ŇõŇćbhakrutsaŠĻĀvatsarada caitra Ňõu 1 ńÄlu ŇõrńęmadrńĀjńĀdhi
rńĀja rńĀjaparamńďŇõvara ŇõrńępatńĀpa vijayabhŇępatirńĀyamahńĀrńĀyara sńĀ(ŠĻĀ)mrńĀ
jyńĀbhyudayakńĀladalu Avara ńÄgŠĻÖńĀdhńĀrakarumappa ŇõrńęmanmahńĀpradhńĀna baice
daŠĻĀŠĻáńĀyakaOŠłćeyara nirŇępadiŠĻĀ nńĀgaŠĻĀŠĻáagaŠł∑u maŠĻĀgalŇęrarńĀjyava pratipńĀlisuva kńĀla
dalu ńÄ vijayabhŇępatirńĀyamahńĀrńĀyarige ńÄyuŠĻ£yńĀbhivŠĻõ
ddhi AhaŠĻĀtńĀgi durggńĀdńďviya japanimittavńĀgi ŇõrńętimirńďŇõvaradńď
varalu yibaru brńĀhmaŠĻáara kayyalu durggńĀparamńďŇõvariya japava mńĀŠłći
sa ńÄyibaThe rest of the inscription is covered by the pedestal of the image.
Digital edition of SII 7.192 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
